anomalies.t: NEW: 4 copilot-CLI failures share an identical signature: exit 1 after 4 attempts, with all known error-category flags FALSE (not CAPI 400, not MCP policy, not model-not-supported, not auth, not null-type-tool-call). Affected: Smoke Copilot (gpt-5.3-codex), PR Sous Chef × 2 (gpt-5-mini), Auto-Triage (gpt-5-mini). 3 of 4 are gpt-5-mini — possible model-specific reliability issue. Output WAS produced (hasOutput=true), so the actual error is in the captured copilot CLI stdout/stderr but not yet classified by the harness.

STUCK 5 DAYS, 3 fresh failures today (100% fail rate). All hit isMaxTurnsExit=true under --max-turns 25. Each failure also opens a comment on cascade-tracker #35532, which is itself becoming noisy. Two-line fix (max-turns: 50 in workflow frontmatter) unactioned. Cumulative wasted cost > $5.

STUCK 9 DAYS: Changeset Generator + Smoke Copilot both on gpt-5.3-codex → routes to gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07 → 404. EXACT same recommendation given for 9 days unactioned. One workflow-frontmatter edit (model: gpt-5.4) blocks resolution.

target=*-without-explicit-number pattern is now affecting 3 distinct safe-output tools (add_comment in Contribution Check, create_pull_request_review_comment in Smoke Claude, set_issue_field in Smoke Codex). Yesterday it was 1 tool. Tool-by-tool prompt fixes won't scale; need a single MCP-boundary validator.
3-day rising cost: $6.05 → $9.90 → $11.33 (+87%). Workflow succeeds but trajectory unsustainable. Likely prompt/input growth. Investigate prompt diff over last 3 commits.
NEW: PR Sous Chef went 0/3 → 2/4 failures today, both gpt-5-mini. Combined with Auto-Triage failure (also gpt-5-mini), suggests possible gpt-5-mini-specific issue today via copilot CLI.
RESOLVED: Yesterday's Playwright FFmpeg/azureedge.net blocked-domain issue did NOT recur. Today's Smoke Claude failure is a separate safe-output target=* issue.
Firewall block rate normalized to 17.2% (was 24.9% yesterday). Playwright Azure-CDN blocks absent today. Baseline restored.
Only 2 of 4 PR Sous Chef runs succeeded today — sample too small to compare turn variance reliably. Held.

81.0% success rate today on 58 completed runs (mid-day, partial). 9-day trend: 92.78 → 88.89 → 85.9 → 75.6 → 41.6 → 81.1 → 94.7 → 85.7 → 90.9 → 81.0. Mostly in normal range; today's dip driven by Avenger (3) + new copilot-CLI category (4) + Changeset (1) + safe-output target=* (3 across 2 workflows).
Day 5 stable for original ENOENT/anthropic-beta failures. 41 copilot runs today across many workflows; the original two failure modes both at zero.

Top eff_tokens today: Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer 54.6M (1 run, $11.33), Daily Testify Uber Super Expert 23.3M (1 run), PR Code Quality Reviewer 22.9M (5 runs), Test Quality Sentinel 22.6M (5 runs), Matt Pocock Skills Reviewer 22.5M (5 runs). Top minutes: Avenger 57m (3 runs all fail), PR Sous Chef 32m (4 runs), Matt Pocock 30m, PR Code Quality 30m, Test Quality 28m.
